title: Shingeki no Craft Resourcepack
description: The official and required resourcepack for Shingeki no Craft!
body:
Shingeki no Craft: A Minecraft Attack on Titan Datapack

Welcome to the world of Shingeki no Craft: A Minecraft version of the popular anime series 'Attack on Titan'. This unique datapack offers you big adventures and new thrill on your Minecraft game.

IMPORTANT: Required Datapack

You need both of them, a the datapack installed in your world and the resourcepack applied into the game. Experience the new narrative, enhanced combats, and breathtaking animations by downloading and installing the Shingeki no Craft. Merge yourself into the Attack on Titan universe.

Download the Datapack here
